description.value:
Your sprouts reach deep into flesh, drawing out strength.

Prerequisites: @UUID[Compendium.pf1-pow.feats.Item.tNhpgV2eEPrlPnOM]{Intoxicating Petal Style}, @UUID[Compendium.pf1-pow.feats.Item.cAgyouSwkSVoY06o]{Intoxicating Petal Growth}, Knowledge (nature) 11 ranks

Benefit: When you inflict sprout on a creature, they gain one additional stack of sprout. This effect only triggers once per round per creature you inflict sprout on. Whenever you gain temporary hit points from Intoxicating Petal Growth, you can choose to forgo gaining temporary hit points and instead be healed for half the temporary hit points you would have gained.

Additionally, enemies inflicted by your sprouts spread that affliction to surrounding creatures. Enemies within 5 feet of another creature you have inflicted with 2 or more sprout stacks are treated as if they have half as many effective sprout stacks as that creature for as long as they remain within range of them. If they are in range of multiple creatures inflicted by your sprouts, they only suffer the higher number of effective stacks. If an enemy in this area is already sprouted by you, these stacks are tracked separately, and they only suffer the negative effects from the larger stack (similar to being sprouted by multiple different creatures). These effective sprout stacks can be torn off: the amount torn off reduces the amount of effective sprout stacks applied to them by this effect until the end of their next turn (these effective sprouts are torn off alongside other sprouts they are afflicted with, as per tearing off multiple stacks of sprouts inflicted by different initiators). For every 5 sprout stacks you inflict a creature with, the range they spread sprouts to nearby enemies increases by 5 feet (10 feet at [sprout 5], 15 feet at [sprout 10], and so on).
